title: /dank/null/no_RCE/
description: A fork of TheRealp455w0rd's /dank/null mod that fixes a very critical RCE vulnerability.
body:
A fork of TheRealp455w0rd's [/dank/null](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dank-null) mod that fixes a very critical vulnerability that allowed arbitrary remote code execution on clients and servers (and therefore even all connected clients on a server).

More information about the vulnerability can be found [here](https://github.com/dogboy21/serializationisbad).
